builds.title: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 Builds
builds.description: Optimized attribute builds for every race, PvE and PvP, with skill, Super Soul, and QQ Bang loadouts.
builds.metaTitle: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 Builds - Best PvE & PvP Loadouts
builds.metaDescription: Master Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 builds: race attribute spreads, Strike vs Ki Blast, Super Souls, skills, and QQ Bang recipes for PvE and PvP.
builds.whatIsDescription: Builds are complete loadouts for your custom Time Patroller — attribute points across Health, Ki, Stamina, Basic Attacks, Strike Supers, and Ki Blast Supers, paired with skills, Super Souls, and QQ Bang gear. The right build turns a fresh CAC into a raid-ready fighter.

whySteps.step1Description: Each race has unique passives and transformations; builds are tuned to amplify those strengths for Strike, Ki Blast, or hybrid play.
whySteps.step2Description: Avoid wasted points with tested distributions that keep Health, Stamina, and Ki sustainable through long Parallel Quests and raids.
whySteps.step3Description: Every build bundles the matching skills, Super Soul, and QQ Bang recipe so you can replicate the setup end to end.

characters.title: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 Characters
characters.description: Every playable character and preset with unlock conditions, skill sets, and tier rankings for each mode.
characters.metaTitle: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 Characters - Unlock Guide & Tier List
characters.metaDescription: Unlock and master every Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 character: presets, transformations, skill sets, and tier rankings for PvP and PvE.
characters.whatIsDescription: Characters covers the official playable roster — Goku, Vegeta, DLC additions, and every preset form — with how to unlock them, their skill sets, transformations, and where each shines in Parallel Quests, Expert Missions, and online battles.

whySteps.step1Description: Find exactly which Parallel Quest, story chapter, or DLC pack unlocks each character and preset form.
whySteps.step2Description: See which characters perform best in PvP, raids, and Expert Missions so you pick the right fighter for the job.
whySteps.step3Description: Each entry lists equipped skills, Super Souls, and available transformations for informed switching.

abilities.title: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 Abilities
abilities.description: Every Super, Ultimate, Evasive, and Awoken skill with unlock location, cost, and best use cases.
abilities.metaTitle: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 Abilities - Skills & Transformations
abilities.metaDescription: Complete Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 ability database: Super, Ultimate, Evasive, and Awoken skills with unlock locations, Ki cost, and combos.
abilities.whatIsDescription: Abilities covers the skills and transformations themselves — Super Attacks, Ultimate Attacks, Evasive Skills, and Awoken (transformation) skills — with how to unlock each one, Ki or Stamina cost, damage type, and the best combos and situations to use them.

whySteps.step1Description: Know which Parallel Quest drops a skill, which mentor teaches it, or which TP Medal shop stocks it.
whySteps.step2Description: Plan combos around resource costs so transformations and ultimates are ready when you need them.
whySteps.step3Description: Each skill notes ideal combos, synergy with builds, and which enemies it counters.

quests.title: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 Quests
quests.description: Parallel Quests and Expert Missions with objectives, hidden conditions, Z Rank, and Ultimate Finish rewards.
quests.metaTitle: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 Quests - Parallel Quests & Expert Missions
quests.metaDescription: Clear every Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 Parallel Quest and Expert Mission: objectives, hidden conditions, Ultimate Finish, Z Rank, and drops.
quests.whatIsDescription: Quests covers the permanent PvE challenges — Parallel Quests and Expert Missions — with full objective lists, hidden win conditions for Ultimate Finish, Z Rank requirements, and the skills, gear, and characters each one drops.

whySteps.step1Description: Hit the hidden triggers that spawn Ultimate Finish for the best drop rates on rare skills and gear.
whySteps.step2Description: Earn Z Rank consistently with damage, combo, and time targets that maximize your score.
whySteps.step3Description: See exactly which skills, clothes, and Super Souls each quest can reward before you grind.

equipment.title: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 Equipment
equipment.description: QQ Bang recipes, clothing stats, Super Souls, and mixing materials for the best passive bonuses.
equipment.metaTitle: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 Equipment - QQ Bangs & Super Souls
equipment.metaDescription: Optimize Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 gear: QQ Bang recipes, clothing stats, Super Soul effects, and mixing materials for every build.
equipment.whatIsDescription: Equipment covers QQ Bangs, clothing sets, Super Souls, and mixing materials — the passive stat bonuses and effects that shape a build. Find QQ Bang recipes, compare clothing attributes, and match Super Souls to your playstyle.

whySteps.step1Description: Combine the right clothing and mixing items to craft QQ Bangs with strong, balanced stat bonuses.
whySteps.step2Description: Browse Super Souls by their activation conditions and buffs to pick the one that fuels your build.
whySteps.step3Description: Compare outfits across all six attributes to build the optimal passive stat profile.

dlc.whatIsDescription: DLC covers the paid content packs — from Legendary Pack to Future Saga — listing the characters, Parallel Quests, skills, and story chapters each adds, plus version differences and a recommended buying order so you spend wisely.

whySteps.step1Description: See exactly which characters, quests, and skills each DLC pack adds before you buy.
whySteps.step2Description: Follow a ranked buying order based on character value, content volume, and meta impact.
whySteps.step3Description: Understand pack, season pass, and bundle differences so you do not double-purchase.

updates.whatIsDescription: Updates covers time-limited patches, server maintenance, raid schedules, and festival events — with balance changes, raid reward tables, and clear start and end dates so you never miss a limited-time activity.

whySteps.step1Description: Know when each raid opens and closes and which rewards are available during the window.
whySteps.step2Description: Stay current on skill and character balance changes that shift the PvP and PvE meta.
whySteps.step3Description: Catch limited-time festivals and their exclusive rewards before the event ends.

mods.whatIsDescription: Mods covers the PC modding scene — installers like XV2 Mods, costume and skill replacements, and gameplay overhauls — with safe installation steps, version compatibility notes, and fixes for the errors that appear after game patches.

whySteps.step1Description: Install mod installers and load mods correctly without breaking your base game files.
whySteps.step2Description: Track which mods break after each update and how to patch or replace them.
whySteps.step3Description: Resolve common crashes, missing textures, and loader errors with tested fixes.

beginnerGuide.title: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 Beginner Guide
beginnerGuide.intro: Create a Time Patroller, pick a race, learn the combat fundamentals, and follow an efficient early-game route through the story, mentors, and Conton City activities. Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 rewards a clear build direction from the very first hour.

steps.title: Create Your Time Patroller and Choose a Race
steps.description: Pick from Saiyan, Majin, Frieza Race, Namekian, Earthling, and DLC races. Each race has unique base stats and its own transformation line: Saiyans access Super Saiyan forms, Earthlings auto-charge Ki and boost basic attacks, Majins are naturally tanky, Namekians regenerate health, and the Frieza Race is the fastest mover.

steps.title: Master Basic Combat and Stamina
steps.description: Learn light and heavy strings, Vanishes, Just Guard, and stamina breaks. Stamina fuels Vanishes and evasives, while Ki powers supers and ultimates, so managing both is the core skill that separates new and veteran players.

steps.title: Train Under Instructors
steps.description: Approach masters like Goku, Vegeta, Cell, and Beerus in Conton City and complete their lesson chains. Finishing an instructor's lessons unlocks their skills, Super Souls, and customization options for your Time Patroller.

steps.title: Progress the Main Story and Open Conton City
steps.description: Push the main story to unlock Parallel Quests, Expert Missions, raids, and hub activities. Story progress also opens new mentors, the Dragon Ball Pedestal, and the QQ Bang and mixing shops.

steps.title: Pick Your First Build Direction
steps.description: Commit attribute points to one damage type early, Ki Blast Super, Strike Super, or Basic Attack, instead of spreading them evenly. A focused build clears Parallel Quests faster and is easy to fine-tune once you understand the game.

quickTips: Equip a charge skill as soon as one is unlocked so Ki never bottlenecks your supers.
Save your attribute points for a focused stat; Shenron can fully respec you later.
Complete every instructor lesson to permanently unlock their skills and Super Souls.
Raise friendship with key mentors to unlock race-specific rewards like Super Saiyan God.

charactersTierList.title: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 Characters Tier List
charactersTierList.intro: Ranking the strongest playable characters for Parallel Quests, Expert Missions, raids, and PvP. Top picks combine long reach, combo potential, forgiving supers, and high ultimate damage, while a well-built custom Time Patroller can outclass any preset at endgame.

tiers.label: Top Tier
tiers.description: The best all-rounders for raids and endgame PvE: huge ultimate damage, safe supers, and strong neutral tools.

tiers.label: Strong All-Round
tiers.description: Reliable across every mode with great combo routes and high-damage Awoken Skills.

tiers.label: Solid Niche
tiers.description: Strong in specific matchups and modes, often chosen for style or specific raid roles.

tiers.label: Beginner & Style
tiers.description: Fun and accessible early picks that get outclassed by S and A tier characters at endgame.

charactersTierList.note: A custom Time Patroller with a focused build, a good QQ Bang, and the right Awoken Skill can out-damage every preset character on this list.

bestBuildsAndQQBangs.title: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 Best Builds and QQ Bangs
bestBuildsAndQQBangs.intro: Recommended attribute spreads, Awoken Skills, Super Souls, and QQ Bangs for every race and playstyle. Cover Ki Blast, Strike, hybrid, raid support, and PvP builds, each with a clear focus and known weaknesses.

builds.name: Ki Blast Saiyan
builds.description: Stack Ki Blast Super, run Super Saiyan Blue or Ultra Instinct, and spam tracking beam ultimates. The strongest general-purpose PvE damage build.

builds.name: Strike Martial Artist
builds.description: Earthling or Majin with Potential Unleashed, high stamina, and relentless melee plus stamina-break combos. Dominates close-range PvP.

builds.name: Hybrid Balanced
builds.description: A forgiving split build for players still choosing a direction. Works in most Parallel Quests while you learn what you enjoy.

builds.name: Raid Support Tank
builds.description: Majin or Namekian with Super Guard, Energy Zone, and a team-healing Super Soul. Keeps escorts and allies alive through raid hazards.

builds.name: PvP Zoner
builds.description: Frieza Race built for movement and ranged supers, using speed to punish approaches and whiff-punish with beam supers.

builds.name: Glass Cannon
builds.description: All-in offense paired with the Super Soul that trades defense for raw damage. High risk, but deletes stamina-broken bosses.

qqBangs.name: What a QQ Bang Does
qqBangs.description: A QQ Bang adds stat modifiers on top of your attributes and clothing. A perfect QQ Bang can add up to +5 to a key stat like Ki Blast Super or Strike Super.

qqBangs.name: Aim for One Main Stat
qqBangs.description: Craft until your primary damage stat is strongly positive, with no Ki or stamina penalty. Even a mixed QQ Bang is a big upgrade over no QQ Bang at all.

qqBangs.name: Mixing for Better Rolls
qqBangs.description: Combine higher-star clothing with matching materials and Super Mix Capsules at the QQ Bang shop to raise the ceiling on your rolls.

transformationsAndAwokenSkills.title: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 Transformations and Awoken Skills
transformationsAndAwokenSkills.intro: Every race-specific and universal Awoken Skill, with Ki cost, unlock route, and effect. Choose the transformation that matches your build's damage type and Ki economy.

transformations.name: Super Saiyan (1 / 2 / 3)
transformations.effect: Boosts melee and strike damage; higher forms add more power but drain Ki faster.

transformations.name: Super Saiyan God
transformations.unlock: Shenron wish + max friendship with Goku, Vegeta, Gohan & Videl, Gotenks, and Pan
transformations.effect: A balanced transformation with strong all-round stats and manageable Ki drain.

transformations.name: Super Saiyan Blue (SSGSS)
transformations.effect: Excellent Ki Blast and defense; one of the strongest Saiyan endgame forms.

transformations.name: Ultra Instinct
transformations.effect: Auto-dodge window and Ki auto-recovery; a top pick for any race at endgame.

transformations.name: Beast
transformations.effect: Massive damage and lifesteal; an aggressive all-round transformation.

transformations.name: Potential Unleashed
transformations.unlock: Elder Kai mission at level cap
transformations.effect: A reliable all-round stat boost and the default pick for most PvP builds.

transformations.name: Turn Golden
transformations.effect: Strong Ki Blast and speed boost tailored to the Frieza Race.

transformations.name: Purification
transformations.effect: Transforms into a Kid Buu-style form with high damage and fast stamina use.

transformations.name: Become Giant
transformations.effect: Become a Great Namek with huge health and supers that cover the whole arena.

transformations.name: Future Super Saiyan
transformations.effect: Fast Ki regeneration; great for builds that spam supers back to back.

parallelQuestsAndExpertMissions.title: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 Parallel Quests and Expert Missions
parallelQuestsAndExpertMissions.intro: High-value Parallel Quests and Expert Missions for Dragon Balls, rare skills, Z ranks, escort clears, and late-game boss farming. Each entry shows the difficulty, key rewards, DLC requirement, and the clear strategy.

quests.strategy: Burst Frieza under three minutes, then clear the three Time Patrollers. The fastest repeatable Dragon Ball route in the game.

quests.mission: PQ 4 - Prepare for the Attack of Saiyans!
quests.strategy: Defeat Gohan and Piccolo fast, then challenge the Time Patrollers. The most beginner-friendly Dragon Ball route.

quests.rewards: Mighty Explosive Wave, Vegeta's Shirt, Dragon Balls
quests.strategy: Break each Great Ape's stamina before unloading ultimates, and save Ki for the Time Patroller wave.

quests.mission: PQ 83 - Dangerous Duo! Warriors Never Rest
quests.rewards: Charge, High Mix Capsule, Energy Capsule L
quests.strategy: Pull Broly away from Gohan before collecting the Dragon Balls so the escort survives.

quests.rewards: x100 Big Bang Kamehameha, SSGSS Vegeta Wig, Whis Symbol Suit
quests.strategy: Stamina-break before long ultimates and finish one target before switching so the pair cannot interrupt you.

quests.mission: PQ 122 - The Final Battle Before the Final Battle?!
quests.rewards: Meditation, Power Rush, All-Regen & Senzu capsules
quests.strategy: Extra Pack 2. Bring healing capsules and a stamina-break combo, and repeat the Ultimate Finish for both Meditation and Power Rush.

quests.mission: PQ 134 - Universe 7's Next God of Destruction
quests.rewards: Burst Charge, Ultimate Charge, Power Super Soul
quests.strategy: Ultra Pack 1. Farm Ultra Instinct Goku for Burst Charge and SSGSS Evolved Vegeta for Ultimate Charge while keeping Whis alive.
Hold Super Guard through Peeler Storm, revive allies instantly, and avoid long animations when the boss teleports.

parallelQuestsAndExpertMissions.scoringTip: Earn Z rank through accolades, not just clear time: build a long combo, land Ki blasts, perform grabs and Just Guards, break guards, defeat several enemies, and finish with a Super or Ultimate Attack.

skillsAndSuperSouls.title: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 Skills and Super Souls
skillsAndSuperSouls.intro: Compare reliable Super Attacks, Ultimate Attacks, Evasive Skills, charge skills, and Super Souls for quests, raids, and PvP. Every entry includes its effect, unlock source, and DLC requirement.

skills.name: Burst Charge
skills.effect: Restores Ki very quickly at the start of the charge, then slows down.
skills.source: PQ 134 - Universe 7's Next God of Destruction

skills.name: Ultimate Charge
skills.effect: Starts slowly but accelerates, ideal for large Ki refills.
skills.source: PQ 134 - Universe 7's Next God of Destruction

skills.name: Meditation
skills.effect: Raises maximum Ki to ten bars and enables Ki auto-recovery while active.
skills.source: PQ 122 - The Final Battle Before the Final Battle?!

skills.name: Photon Swipe
skills.effect: Fast palm wave that handles large targets and returns giant Ki blasts.

skills.name: Super Guard
skills.effect: Grants protection while held, consuming Ki for the duration.

skills.name: Power Rush
skills.effect: A ten-bar Strike Ultimate with extreme damage on stamina-broken targets.
skills.source: PQ 122 - The Final Battle Before the Final Battle?!

skills.name: Super Electric Strike
skills.effect: Wide electrical blast that hits grouped enemies and large bosses.
skills.source: Expert Mission 11 - The Devil Born from Dragon Balls

skills.name: Energy Zone
skills.effect: Creates a healing field that restores the user and allies inside it.

skills.name: Instant Rise
skills.effect: Uses stamina to escape vertically without a long animation.

skills.name: Hmm Hmm Hmmm! Hm Hmmm! Hmmm!
skills.effect: Team health auto-recovery while an Awoken Skill and a reinforcement skill are both active.

skills.name: Power! A lotta power! It's great!
skills.effect: Greatly raises maximum Ki and maximum stamina.
skills.source: PQ 134 - Universe 7's Next God of Destruction

skills.name: I've cast aside everything for this!
skills.effect: A major all-attack boost in exchange for defense, movement, and recovery penalties.

skillsAndSuperSouls.comboTip: A reliable endgame combo is Meditation to raise Ki, a heavy stamina break, then Power Rush, with Burst Charge ready to refill Ki between targets.

dragonBallsAndShenronWishes.title: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 Dragon Balls and Shenron Wishes
dragonBallsAndShenronWishes.intro: Use fast Time Patroller routes to collect all seven Dragon Balls, then spend each Shenron summon on characters, skills, transformations, cosmetics, levels, or resources.

farmSteps.title: Prepare a fast damage loadout
farmSteps.details: Equip one quick Super Attack, one strong Ultimate Attack, a charge skill, and enough stamina to avoid losing time to enemy pressure.

farmSteps.title: Run PQ 23 and defeat Frieza under three minutes
farmSteps.details: Clear the short opening fight immediately to trigger the Ultimate Finish route on The Explosion of Namek.

farmSteps.title: Defeat all three Time Patrollers
farmSteps.details: Focus one Patroller at a time. Each defeated Patroller can drop a Dragon Ball key item, so a single run can yield more than one ball.

farmSteps.title: Watch for the Key Item notification
farmSteps.details: A Dragon Ball appears as a Key Item reward during the Patroller fight. Complete the mission and repeat until you hold all seven.

farmSteps.title: Use alternative routes when needed
farmSteps.details: PQ 4 offers an early-game Patroller fight, while PQ 79 adds a longer Great Ape route with another three-Patroller finish.

farmSteps.title: Summon Shenron in Conton City
farmSteps.details: Take all seven Dragon Balls to the Dragon Ball Pedestal, summon Shenron, and select one wish. The seven balls are consumed after the wish.

wishes.reward: Hit, Eis Shenron, Nuova Shenron, and Omega Shenron

wishes.wish: I Want To Become A Super Saiyan God!
wishes.reward: Unlocks the Super Saiyan God Awoken Skill path
wishes.bestFor: Saiyan Time Patrollers; requires max friendship with Goku, Vegeta, Gohan & Videl, Gotenks, and Pan.

wishes.wish: I Want A New Ultimate Attack!
wishes.reward: Time Skip/Molotov first, then Ice Cannon and Burning Spin

wishes.wish: I Want A New Super Attack!
wishes.reward: Flash Fist Crush first, then Ice Claw, Ice Field, Burst Attack, and Burst Reflection

wishes.wish: I Want A Second Chance At Life!
wishes.bestFor: Rebuilding a character from Strike to Ki Blast or fixing early stat choices.
Buying skills, clothing, and capsules; repeatable.

wishes.reward: 6 Soul Echo Devices and 3 Soul Diffusion Mix Devices
wishes.bestFor: Mixing and QQ Bang materials; repeatable.

wishes.reward: Raises the current character by one level
wishes.bestFor: Skipping a difficult late-level grind; repeatable.

dlcAndUpdates.title: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 DLC and Updates
dlcAndUpdates.intro: Every major DLC pack, pass, free update, and edition for Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2, with the characters, quests, skills, and content each one adds. Use the purchase notes to avoid buying an individual pack that is already inside a pass or set.

packs.name: Super Pass
packs.characters: Cabba, Frost, Champa, Vados, Goku Black (Rosé), Zamasu, Bojack, SSGSS Vegito, Fused Zamasu
packs.contents: Super Packs 1-4 with Universe 6 tournament and Future Trunks-era episodes, new stages, and master content.
packs.note: Buy the pass instead of Super Packs 1-4 separately when you want the full first DLC wave.

packs.name: Extra Pass
packs.characters: Jiren, Fu, Android 17 (DBS), Goku (Ultra Instinct), Super Baby 2, Kefla, SSGSS Gogeta, Broly (Full Power Super Saiyan) and more
packs.contents: Extra Packs 1-4, the Infinite History scenario, and 20 Parallel Quests across the four packs.
packs.note: The pass already contains Extra Packs 1, 2, 3, and 4.

packs.name: Ultra Pack Set
packs.characters: Ribrianne, SSGSS Vegeta (Evolved), Vegeta (Super Saiyan God), Android 21, Majuub
packs.contents: Ultra Packs 1-2 with 10 Parallel Quests and key rewards like Burst Charge, Ultimate Charge, and Photon Swipe.
packs.note: The set contains both Ultra Packs, so do not combine it with either individual pack.

packs.name: Legendary Pack Set
packs.characters: Pikkon, Toppo (God of Destruction), Jiren (Full Power), Gogeta (DB Super), Caulifla (Super Saiyan 2), Kale (Super Saiyan 2)
packs.contents: Legendary Packs 1-2 with new Fu-altered story content, Extra Missions, Parallel Quests, and high-impact rewards.
packs.note: Choose the set for both chapters; individual packs duplicate content already inside it.

packs.name: Hero of Justice Pack Set
packs.characters: Gamma 1, Gamma 2, Gohan (DBS Super Hero), Gohan (Beast), Orange Piccolo, Piccolo (Power Awakening)
packs.contents: Hero of Justice Packs 1-2 with Parallel Quests, Extra Missions, 14 moves, 10 Super Souls, and a new stage.
packs.note: The set contains both packs; avoid buying either separately after the set.

packs.name: Future Saga Pack Set
packs.characters: Vegeta (Super Saiyan God), Goku Black (Rosé), Broly (Restrained), Android 18 (DBS), Jiren (Full Power), and more
packs.contents: Future Saga Chapters 1-4 with Extra Mission arcs, Parallel Quests, 32 moves, 15 Super Souls, and a new Awoken Skill.
packs.note: The set contains Chapters 1-4; every chapter is also sold separately, so buying both formats duplicates content.

packs.name: Dragon Ball DAIMA Pack
packs.characters: Goku (Super Saiyan 4, DAIMA), Vegeta (Super Saiyan 3, DAIMA)
packs.contents: DAIMA Parallel Quests, CaC skills, Super Souls, and cosmetics inspired by the DAIMA fighters.
packs.note: A standalone expansion separate from Future Saga and the older passes.

packs.name: Beast, Ultra Instinct & Festival Updates
packs.contents: Free Awoken Skills for CaCs (Beast in March 2023, Ultra Instinct in October 2023), Festival of Universes, Cross Versus, and recurring Conton City Tournament content.
packs.note: These systems and Awoken Skills are free; paid characters and quests still require their DLC packs.

dlcAndUpdates.duplicateTip: Before checkout, check your owned-DLC list. Passes contain their packs, so never combine Super Pass with Super Packs 1-4, Extra Pass with Extra Packs 1-4, or any set with its individual components.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2

questions.question: What is Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2?
questions.answer: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 is a 3D arena anime fighter and action RPG where you create a custom Time Patroller, train under Dragon Ball masters, transform, and battle through the story, Parallel Quests, Expert Missions, raids, and PvP.

questions.question: What platforms is Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 on?
questions.answer: Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 is available on PC (Steam), PlayStation 4, Xbox One, and Nintendo Switch, with PC offering the largest modding community.

questions.question: Does Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 have multiplayer?
questions.answer: Yes. Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 supports online PvP, Parallel Quest co-op for up to three players, six-player Expert Missions, raids, Festival of Universes, and Cross Versus.

questions.question: What is the best race for a new Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 player?
questions.answer: Saiyans and Earthlings are the most beginner-friendly races in Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2. Saiyans get powerful Super Saiyan transformations, while Earthlings auto-charge Ki and boost basic attacks.

questions.question: How do I unlock transformations in Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2?
questions.answer: Race-specific Awoken Skills unlock through mentor lessons and house quests, while universal forms like Ultra Instinct and Beast come from free updates. Super Saiyan God requires a Shenron wish and max friendship with key mentors.

questions.question: How do I farm Dragon Balls in Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2?
questions.answer: Defeat Time Patrollers in Parallel Quests for random Dragon Ball key-item drops. PQ 23 - The Explosion of Namek is the fastest route, with PQ 4 and PQ 79 as solid alternatives.

questions.question: Do I need DLC to enjoy Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2?
questions.answer: No. Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 has a complete base game, and free updates add Awoken Skills like Beast and Ultra Instinct. DLC packs add characters, quests, and skills for players who want more content.

questions.question: Is Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 still updated?
questions.answer: Yes. Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2 continues to receive new DLC and free updates, including the four-part Future Saga and the Dragon Ball DAIMA Pack.

cta.title: Ready to Master Dragon Ball Xenoverse 2?
